sizing_rule.note: Recalculate optimal f frequently using current trade P&L data standardized via Equation (3.16). Update LOC, SCALE, SKEW, KURT parameters as market distribution characteristics drift over time. This is a dynamic parametric optimal f approach, not static.

source_rule_text: Frequently recalculate optimal f parameters (LOC, SCALE, SKEW, KURT) on current trade profits and losses data because the actual distribution of trade P&L changes constantly over time, albeit slowly.
